remainingPhases: Demo Document Generation and Data Handling
nextPhaseDescription: The next round should focus on implementing the demo document generation using PDFKit and Handlebars templates. This includes creating templates for demo documents, generating PDFs, and setting up seed data files in JSON format. Additionally, implement the CSV file upload and parsing functionality, storing the results in SQLite. Finally, ensure the financial overview dashboard displays summaries using seed data, and conduct thorough testing to validate the entire system.
